name: Star Anise Liqueur
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons broken and slightly crushed star anise
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the slightly crushed star anise to the vodka and steep for 1-1/2 weeks.
2. Filter through cheesecloth.
3. Add one cup of sugar syrup. Stir thoroughly.
4. Taste and add more sugar syrup, stirring and tasting after each addition, until the desired sweetness is achieved.
5. Rinse an intact star anise lightly in warm water and add it to the bottle.
